title: Revert controller-induced policy drift to last-known-good
trigger_signature: Step increase in config_drift_score across multiple sites simultaneously with no hardware alarm; traced to a controller commit.

actions.description: Diff running configuration vs golden across all affected sites to confirm drift is configuration, not a physical fault.
actions.command_or_guidance: napalm compare_config golden ; controller: show config-diff vs last-known-good
actions.verification: Config diff confirms simultaneous multi-site drift; no hardware alarm present.

actions.description: Attribute the drift to a controller push/commit (commit id, approver, timestamp) from the audit log.
actions.command_or_guidance: controller: show audit-log commits last 1h ; correlate commit time with metric change onset
actions.verification: Offending commit id and approver identified; onset aligns with the commit.

actions.description: Revert to the last-known-good policy on the controller (roll back the offending commit).
actions.rollback: controller: re-apply the offending commit if the revert causes regressions, then escalate
actions.verification: config_drift_score returns to zero across all sites; affected metrics normalise.

actions.description: Re-push the golden configuration to the affected sites if a full controller revert is too broad, keeping an audit record of the approver.
actions.rollback: napalm rollback to the pre-push checkpoint
actions.verification: Intent and forwarding paths match golden; path_asymmetry clears.
